home.heroTitle3: One Small Step at a Time
home.heroDescription: Rediscover happiness through simple, achievable mini-tasks designed by mental health experts. Start your journey toward a brighter, more fulfilling life today.
home.gratitudeDesc: Write down 3 things you're grateful for
home.sanskritQuote: उद्यमेन हि सिध्यन्ति कार्याणि न मनोरथैः। न हि सुप्तस्य सिंहस्य प्रविशन्ति मुखे मृगाः॥
home.sanskritTranslation: Success comes only through effort, not by mere wishes. Even a lion cannot have deer walk into its mouth while sleeping.
home.whyChooseDesc: Our platform combines evidence-based practices with modern technology to create a personalized mental health journey that fits your lifestyle.
home.personalizedTasksDesc: Daily activities tailored to your mood and preferences, designed to build positive momentum
home.progressTrackingDesc: Visual insights into your emotional journey with detailed mood patterns and achievements
home.communitySupportDesc: Connect with others on similar journeys in a safe, supportive environment
home.safeSecureDesc: Your mental health data is protected with enterprise-grade security
home.howItWorksDesc: Simple steps to start your mental health journey
home.step1Desc: Create your account and complete a quick mood assessment to help us understand your current state and preferences.
home.step2Desc: Receive personalized mini-tasks each day, designed to gradually improve your mood and build positive habits.
home.step3Desc: Monitor your emotional journey with detailed insights, celebrate achievements, and connect with a supportive community.
home.sampleTasksDesc: Small actions that create big changes in your mental well-being
home.whatUsersSayDesc: Real stories from people who transformed their lives with PRAYAS
home.ctaTitle: Ready to Transform Your Mental Health?
home.ctaDesc: Join thousands of users who have already started their journey toward better mental health. Your transformation begins with a single step.
home.testimonial1Text: PRAYAS helped me find joy in small moments. The daily tasks are simple but incredibly powerful.
home.testimonial2Text: I never thought 5-minute activities could make such a difference. My mood has improved significantly.
home.testimonial3Text: The community support and personalized tasks made all the difference in my healing journey.

about.title: About PRAYAS
about.subtitle: Creating positive change through small, meaningful actions
about.missionP1: PRAYAS was born from a simple yet powerful insight: small positive actions can create meaningful change in our mental well-being over time.
about.missionP2: In a world where mental health challenges affect millions, PRAYAS offers a path toward well-being through simple, daily practices.
about.impactStat1Desc: People die due to suicide every year according to WHO
about.impactStat2Desc: Carefully designed activities to improve mental well-being
about.impactStat3Desc: Key focus areas: Gratitude, Mindfulness, Self-care, and Connection
about.approachP1: In today's fast-paced and stressful world, depression and mental health struggles are increasingly prevalent.
about.approachP2: Our platform provides an interactive and supportive environment where users can gradually build positive habits, feel a sense of accomplishment, and track their progress.
about.activity1Desc: Write down three things you're grateful for today.
about.activity2Desc: Take 5 minutes to focus on your breathing using the 4-4-4 technique.
about.activity3Desc: Say positive affirmations in front of a mirror.
about.activity4Desc: Do something kind for someone today, no matter how small.
about.teamSubtitle: Meet the dedicated team creating positive change through technology

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.subtitle: Fill up the form and our team will get back to you within 24 hours

footer.aboutUsDesc: We are committed to delivering the best service and information. Our mission is to enrich lives through exceptional digital experiences.
